place: Maenam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Contemporary Four-Bedroom Garden Pool Villa in Maenam
blurb: A brand-new four-bedroom pool villa in a quiet Maenam residence, completed in 2025 — single-storey living around a fourteen-metre private pool and a landscaped garden, with four en-suite bedrooms, an open designer kitchen and a covered lounge sala. ฿12,900,000.
detail:
Set in a peaceful part of Maenam on Koh Samui's calm northern coast, this brand-new single-storey villa is arranged around a striking fourteen-metre private pool. It sits on 597 m² of land with 348 m² of built space, finished in a warm contemporary palette of timber, stone and white, a short drive from Maenam's beach, walking street and the wider Bophut dining scene.

The open living level runs from a designer kitchen with a central island and breakfast bar through bright living and dining areas that slide open to the pool terrace. Four double bedrooms each have their own en-suite bathroom, several opening directly to the pool and garden, with air-conditioning throughout and the villa delivered fully furnished.

The long pool is framed by lawn, tropical planting and a covered lounge sala for shaded afternoons. The villa is held on a registered leasehold with approximately 29 years remaining, running to July 2055. Lease terms, floor plan and inventory on request.
